title: tectaria cicutaria
intro: Tectaria cicutaria, also known as the lady fern, is a type of fern species found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tectaria cicutaria include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make tea, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
